title: Techrot
description: Control machinery powered by sentient rot, how much are you willing to give in exchange for power?
body:
![TECHROT BANNER](https://imgur.com/0xdCBJN.png)
This mod requires patchouli
This Mod was developed for the 1.12.2 Coalition Modjam!

![TECHROT IMPLANT LOOP](https://i.imgur.com/H9dG0o6.gif)
Reject your humanity, and enhance yourself with rotplate implants, beware though
power comes at a price.

![TECHROT TOXIC FUME LOOP](https://i.imgur.com/MsswNXy.gif)
Through the use of sentient rot encased in machinery you'll be able to pollute the word and exploit all of it's resources!

![DEVELOPED BY TEAMBK](https://i.imgur.com/32oE3jv.png)


![1.12.2 MOD COALITION MODJAM 2025](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CalaMariGold/Modernized-1.12/refs/heads/main/1.12%20Coalition%20Assets/phoenixlogo2x1textlarge.png)
